candidates.why: Direct total revenue line and one of the provided preferred candidates; matches top-line sales.
Direct sales line with identical values to Total Revenue; useful as fallback if label changes by year.

variables.notes: Both labels represent the same top-line metric; ordered with NET SALES first as the more specific sales label, and Total Revenue as fallback.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs and the provided preferred candidate for COGS.

variables.notes: Selected the direct cost line consistent with cost of sales/production inputs.

candidates.why: Personnel-related operating overhead; appropriate SG&A component and not COGS/D&A/interest/tax.
Broad overhead bucket for operating expenses; appropriate when explicit SG&A line exists but appears unpopulated in preview.
Selling/marketing overhead, but likely a subcomponent within Other operating expenses, so less preferred to avoid double counting.
Explicit SG&A label exists, but appears empty in preview; per rule, include it along with a closest overhead bucket for coverage across years.
Dedicated R&D row exists but appears below EBIT/supplemental in the statement ordering, so should not be added to XSGA under the placement rule.

variables.notes: Used the explicit SG&A row plus overhead buckets because Selling/General/Admin. Expense is present but unpopulated in the preview. Excluded Advertising and Marketing Expenses to avoid likely double counting within Other operating expenses. Excluded Research and Development from XSGA because its row appears below EBIT in the statement order.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D label exists; it appears below EBIT/supplemental, so valid for XRD but not for inclusion in XSGA.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D row exists. It is positioned below EBIT in the preview, so mapped only to XRD.

candidates.why: Broad finance expense line; acceptable fallback if specific interest expense is unavailable in a given year.
Too broad and less directly tied to interest expense than the specific interest rows.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses from financial liabilities measured at amortised cost
candidates.why: Best direct match to interest expense and preferred over broader financial expense lines.
Specific interest expense component; useful fallback if the main borrowing-interest label is unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure; lower priority than the main interest expense rows.
Candidate is on the balance sheet and not suitable versus the income-statement interest expense rows.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses from financial liabilities measured at amortised cost

variables.notes: Ordered as a priority list: specific borrowing interest first, lease interest second, and broad Financial expenses as fallback.

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of the Parent Company
candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not a balance sheet equity stock measure.

candidates.row_label: Share of other comprehensive income of equity-accounted investees Items that will not be reclassified to profit or loss
candidates.why: OCI detail, not book equity.
Not shareholders' equity.
Asset/investment line, not book equity.
Equity component only, not total book equity.
Equity component only, not total book equity.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to the equity holders of the Parent Company
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests, per rule.
Includes minority interest, so not preferred for BE when a parent-equity line exists.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to the equity holders of the Parent Company

variables.notes: Preferred owner/parent equity line to exclude non-controlling interests and avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement profit allocation, not the balance sheet minority interest stock measure.
Presentation text / attribution label, not minority interest balance.

candidates.row_label: Non-controlling interests Earnings per share for result attributable
candidates.why: EPS attribution label, not minority interest balance.
Direct balance sheet non-controlling interest line; preferred.
Equivalent balance sheet minority interest label; useful fallback if labeling changes by year.

variables.notes: Used balance-sheet NCI labels only, with Non-controlling interests first and Minority Interest as fallback.
